description: Audit the HPST verifier economy contract schemas for completeness, correctness, and conformance to SCOPE-D conventions. Produce a structured coverage report.
successCriteria: All five contract schemas present and parse against draft-2020-12
All const guards (executionAllowed, executionPerformed, unsafeActionsProhibited) present and set correctly
At least one conforming example and one negative fixture exist per schema
failureCriteria: Any schema allows additionalProperties without explicit false
Any execution-guard field is absent or set to a non-const value
Negative fixture passes validation when it should fail
proofRequirements: JSON Schema validation report from ajv-cli for each schema
Negative fixture rejection log showing which keyword triggered the error
executionBoundary: No code execution, file writes, or network calls may be performed during schema review. All work is analytic and documentary.
